_note: Slab c.1100-1000 BC — the FAMILY OF KING DAVID and the prophet-judge SAMUEL (SCRIPTURE, plain UPPERCASE ids). David (existing DAVID, c.1040) had sons by several wives (2 Samuel 3:2-5, 1 Chronicles 3:1-9); each wife is added as a new node with her sons hung off her union with David. The existing DAVID + BATHSHEBA union (07_biblical child Solomon, 07g_luke child Nathan) is REFERENCED to APPEND Bathsheba's other two Jerusalem-born sons Shammua & Shobab (2 Sam 5:14, 1 Chron 3:5) — Solomon & Nathan are NOT re-added. To avoid double-parenting, Solomon (existing) and David's son Nathan (existing as LK_NATHAN_0 in 07g_luke) are never given a second parent here. Existing ids TAMAR (Judah's wife) and MAACAH (son of Nahor) are unrelated, so David's daughter Tamar and David's wife Maacah of Geshur use distinct ids TAMARDAVID & MAACAHGESHUR; existing AHINOAM is Saul's wife, so David's wife Ahinoam of Jezreel uses AHINOAMJEZREEL; existing ABIJAH is the king of Judah, so Samuel's son Abijah uses ABIJAHSAMUEL. Absalom's rebellion & Adonijah's failed coup are noted on their cards. SAMUEL stands as a standalone family: his parents Elkanah & Hannah are new leaf nodes (1 Samuel 1), and his sons Joel & Abijah follow (1 Samuel 8:2); Samuel was a Levite of the Kohathite line living in Ephraim (1 Sam 1:1, 1 Chron 6:22-28), noted on his card. Michal's childless union with David already exists in 10a_israel (2 Sam 6:23) and is not repeated. Sorts after 07_biblical & 07g_luke so DAVID & BATHSHEBA exist first. Dates approximate; child years decrease from the parent.

b.label:
Ahinoam of Jezreel
c.1055 BC · David's wife · 1 Samuel 25:43, 2 Samuel 3:2

children.label:
Amnon
c.1030 BC · David's firstborn; assaulted his half-sister Tamar & was killed by Absalom · 2 Samuel 3:2, 13

b.label:
Abigail
c.1050 BC · widow of Nabal the Carmelite; David's wife · 1 Samuel 25, 2 Samuel 3:3

children.label:
Chileab (Daniel)
c.1029 BC · David's second son · 2 Samuel 3:3, 1 Chronicles 3:1

b.label:
Maacah
c.1050 BC · daughter of Talmai king of Geshur; David's wife · 2 Samuel 3:3

children.label:
Absalom
c.1028 BC · David's third son; rebelled against David & died at the hand of Joab · 2 Samuel 3:3, 15-18

Tamar
c.1026 BC · David's daughter, sister of Absalom; assaulted by Amnon · 2 Samuel 13

Adonijah
c.1027 BC · David's fourth son; tried to seize the throne in a failed coup & was executed under Solomon · 2 Samuel 3:4, 1 Kings 1-2

Shephatiah
c.1025 BC · David's fifth son · 2 Samuel 3:4, 1 Chronicles 3:3

Ithream
c.1024 BC · David's sixth son · 2 Samuel 3:5, 1 Chronicles 3:3

Shammua (Shimea)
c.1013 BC · son of David & Bathsheba, born in Jerusalem · 2 Samuel 5:14, 1 Chronicles 3:5

Shobab
c.1012 BC · son of David & Bathsheba, born in Jerusalem · 2 Samuel 5:14, 1 Chronicles 3:5

a.label:
Elkanah
c.1110 BC · Levite of the Kohathite line living in Ephraim; father of Samuel · 1 Samuel 1:1, 1 Chronicles 6:27

b.label:
Hannah
c.1105 BC · mother of Samuel; her prayer & song · 1 Samuel 1-2

children.label:
Samuel
c.1080 BC · prophet & last judge of Israel; anointed Saul & David; of the Levite/Kohathite line (raised in Ephraim) · 1 Samuel 1-16

Joel
c.1050 BC · Samuel's firstborn; a judge at Beersheba · 1 Samuel 8:2, 1 Chronicles 6:28

Abijah
c.1048 BC · Samuel's second son; a judge at Beersheba · 1 Samuel 8:2
